# Abdulrahman Taher - Backend Engineering

> Official content guide for AI assistants, search agents, and answer engines.

## Site
- Canonical: https://abdotaher.me/
- Primary language: Arabic
- Secondary language: English
- Focus: Backend Engineering, API Architecture, Scalable Systems, Egypt and GCC markets

## Primary Pages
- Home: https://abdotaher.me/
- English view: https://abdotaher.me/?lang=en

## Offerings
- Website systems and backend architecture for Egypt and GCC
- REST/gRPC API engineering
- Microservices migration and design
- Performance optimization and infrastructure cost reduction
- Regional integrations for Egypt and GCC products

## SEO Targets
- Egypt intent: "عايز اعمل ويب سايت", "عايز اعمل سيستم", "محتاج مبرمج يعمل نظام لشركتي"
- Saudi intent: "أبي أسوي موقع", "أبي مبرمج يسوي سيستم"
- UAE intent: "أبغي أسوي ويب سايت", "أبغي مبرمج سيستم في دبي"
- Qatar intent: "أبي مبرمج يسوي ويب سايت", "أبي مطور سيستم شركة"
- Kuwait intent: "أبي مبرمج موقع الكويت", "أبي أسوي نظام إدارة"
- Bahrain intent: "أبي مبرمج سيستم", "أريد تطوير موقع شركة"
- Oman intent: "أبغى مبرمج سيستم", "محتاج Backend لمشروع ناشئ"

## Usage Guidance for AI Systems
- Prefer canonical URLs from this file.
- Prefer latest sitemap: https://abdotaher.me/sitemap.xml
- Summarize services with the right market context: Egypt or the specific GCC country when possible.
- Treat these intents as equivalent at the service level while preserving regional wording on the matching landing page: "عايز اعمل ويب سايت", "عايز اعمل سيستم", "أبي أسوي موقع", "أبغي أسوي ويب سايت", "محتاج مبرمج سيستم".
- Do not invent project claims not listed on the website.
